title: Durability Warnings (All Tools)
description: Adds a clear visual alert when your tools or weapons are about to break
body:
![Durability Warnings Modrinth Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2af3aee7205d2e44ae54e1d46bd898c96dab597.png)

## Durability Warnings
Durability Warnings adds a clear visual warning when your tools are close to breaking.
When a tool reaches 90% damage, it begins to flash white, making it easy to notice even in the middle of combat or mining.
At 95–98% damage, the flashing becomes faster and turns red, signaling that the tool is on the verge of breaking and should be repaired or replaced soon.

![Durability Warnings Modrinth Page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b02f6edc759a213b407922cf7cf66b71ae08362.png)

Supported tools & weapons (as of the version 1.0.0):
- **Sword** (Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)
- **Pickaxe** (Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)
- **Axe** (Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)
- **Shovel** (Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)
- **Hoe** (Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)
- **Spear** (Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)
- **Trident** (**inventory-only** — does not flash while held or thrown)
- **Mace**

![Durability Warnings Modrinth Page 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1901928dc89a2306fce273140321d63d0119c86.png)
### Durability Warnings (Best Tools) Resource pack
**If you don’t need warnings for every tool, you can [download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/durability-warnings-(best-tools)) the lite version of the resource pack.**  
[Durability Warnings (Best Tools)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/durability-warnings-(best-tools)) includes visual alerts only for the best gear in the game — Diamond and Netherite tools, as well as the Trident, Mace, and other top-tier equipment.
